'''Nuffins''' were sapient humanoids, noted for their cleanliness and gentle nature. Princess [[Nampi]]'s ship was a converted [[Nuffin freighter]], and she kept a Nuffin slave on board in order to fool would-be pirates into boarding, whereupon they would be ambushed by the princess's [[Nampi's guards|soldiers]].

{{Species-stub}}
